basic_details.job_title: IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA) Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 1 Aircraft Maintenance Engineer post. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years as on 01-05-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Aircraft Maintenance Engineering/Mechanical Engineering or B.Sc Physics or B.Sc Mathematics, AME License in Category B1 on at least one type of aircraft similar to Diamond DA 40 and Diamond DA42 aircraft operated by IGRUA, Aviation Experience – 2 Years
qualification.details: Aircraft Maintenance Engineering/Mechanical Engineering or B.Sc Physics or B.Sc Mathematics. AME License in Category B1 on at least one type of aircraft similar to Diamond DA 40 and Diamond DA42 aircraft operated by IGRUA. Aviation Experience – 2 Years.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IGRUA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer position is 18th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Aircraft Maintenance Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess Aircraft Maintenance Engineering/Mechanical Engineering or B.Sc Physics or B.Sc Mathematics, along with an AME License in Category B1 and 2 years of aviation experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Aircraft Maintenance Engineer post is 55 years as of 1st May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Aircraft Maintenance Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Aircraft Maintenance Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a written test/interview and an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi.

faq.question: Q8. Which aircraft types are relevant for the AME License requirement?
faq.answer: The AME License should be in Category B1 on at least one type of aircraft similar to Diamond DA 40 and Diamond DA42 aircraft operated by IGRUA.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi located?
faq.answer: The Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 229302.

faq.question: Q10. How should candidates apply for this post?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to send their complete application via email before the last date, ensuring all required documents are attached.
